headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Tech And Telecom Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks during market turbulence. Visit Benzinga for analyst ratings and news on high-yielding stocks in communication services.
